allow: PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\DELL\\Desktop\\git\\travel\\flight-booking-backend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell("--- stray lockfile size ---"; \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\DELL\\package-lock.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length; "--- is C:\\Users\\DELL a git/node project? ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\DELL\\node_modules" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; "--- swc in project? ---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\DELL\\Desktop\\git\\travel\\flight-booking-backend\\node_modules\\@next" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
Bash(rm -f "/c/Users/DELL/package-lock.json" && echo "stray lockfile deleted" || echo "delete failed")

PowerShell("--- node arch/platform ---"; node -e "console.log\(process.platform, process.arch\)"; "--- next optional swc deps in lockfile ---"; Select-String -Path "package-lock.json" -Pattern "swc-win32" | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) }; "--- npm os/cpu config ---"; npm config get os; npm config get cpu)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 12; "TSC EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\DELL\\Desktop\\git\\travel\\flight-booking-backend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(\(Receive-Job $job -Keep\) -match "Ready in"\){ break } }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/offers" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; "OFFERS -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 12; "TSC EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\DELL\\Desktop\\git\\travel\\flight-booking-backend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(\(Receive-Job $job -Keep\) -match "Ready in"\){ break } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $ok=$false; for \($t=0;$t -lt 3 -and -not $ok;$t++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/auth" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "AUTH -> $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } }; if\(-not $ok\){"probe failed"}; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 15; "TSC EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\DELL\\Desktop\\git\\travel\\flight-booking-backend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(\(Receive-Job $job -Keep\) -match "Ready in"\){ break } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/admin/users" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "USERS -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)
